name: Perch with Black Bean Sauce Jjgf65a I.e.s.
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sake or dry sherry wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon of the oil in a pan. Add ginger, garlic, and onion, and sauté over medium heat for 5 minutes.
2. Add chicken broth, sake, soy sauce, sesame oil, black bean sauce, and sugar to the pan. Cook at a low boil for 5 minutes.
3. Strain the mixture through a fine mesh strainer into a bowl, discarding solids.
4. Return the strained sauce to the pan. Combine cornstarch with 1 tablespoon of the black bean sauce in a separate small bowl until smooth. Stir this mixture into the pan and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened (about 2 minutes).
5. If needed, add up to 2 tablespoons of water to adjust the consistency.
6. Heat remaining oil (or oil with butter) in a large skillet. Season the perch filets with white pepper.
7. Sauté the perch over medium-high heat until golden on both sides (3-5 minutes per side).
8. Place the perch on plates and top each filet with some black bean sauce.
9. Makes 2 servings.
